resume.summary: Creative B.Tech student with strong video editing skills and an eye for storytelling, pacing, and visual aesthetics. Experienced in producing short-form and long-form content for social and marketing use. Seeking a Video Editing Internship to contribute to engaging visual content.

education.degree: Bachelor of Mass Media — Audio-Visual Production
education.school: MIT School of Film & Television, Pune
education.coursework: Relevant Coursework: Editing & Post-Production, Motion Graphics, Direction Fundamentals, Sound Editing, Screenwriting

technicalSkills.skillGroup: Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut
Color Grading, Motion Graphics, Sound Design, Storyboarding

experience.title: Video Editing Intern — Synapse Analytics Pvt. Ltd., Pune

bullets.bullet: Edited 30+ short-form videos for social campaigns, increasing average watch-through rate by 25%.
Created motion graphics templates in After Effects, cutting future editing time by 30%.
Collaborated with the marketing team to align edits with brand guidelines and campaign goals.
Edited a 3-minute highlight reel for a 2,000-attendee college fest, viewed 15,000+ times online.
Synced motion graphics and sound design to match event energy and pacing.
Edited 20+ episodes for a tech-education YouTube channel, growing average retention by 20%.
Implemented consistent color grading and intro/outro branding.
Edited a 10-minute short film, handling pacing, sound mixing, and color correction.
Screened at a college film festival to positive audience feedback.

certification.title: Video Editing and Production Fundamentals, Score: 85/100

achievements.achievement: Selected among 80 students college-wide for the Smart India Hackathon (SIH 2024) internal round.
Received the Academic Excellence Award for Semester 2 with the highest GPA (9.3) in the CSE department cohort of 120 students.
Active contributor to two college-wide technical fests, coordinating logistics and technical sessions for 150+ participants.

extracurricular.activity: Core Member, Technical Club, VIT Pune — organised hands-on workshops for 150+ students (2023–Present).
Technical Blogger — published articles on Medium covering tools and best practices relevant to the field; collectively read 4,000+ times.
Volunteer Mentor, CodeForGood (NGO Initiative) — guided 15 high school students through technology fundamentals over an 8-week programme.
